notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the python3.12 SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 9.6. It addresses 7 CVEs: CVE-2025-13837, CVE-2025-15282, CVE-2026-0672, CVE-2026-1502, CVE-2026-2297, and 2 more.
